text:
Add stage support and upgrade dependency to mail/gmime26-sharp
	
Add stage support
Add LICENSE=LGPL21
Upgrade dependency to mail/gmime26-sharp
Additional USES=libtool pathfix shared-mime-info tar:xz
Added missing USE_GNOME=desktopfileutils
Apply changed CONFIGURE_ARGS
post-install strip libtomboy.so & @update-desktop-database

Successful test on poudriere 10.0-RELEASE

Fix: Apply patch
